R.T: financial exchange. It is a mobile app (React Native)
with a Node.js/TypeScript backend. The app has two markets: a Personal IPO Market (students trade
each other's social clout) and a Prop Market (students bet on campus events). It also
anonymous Rumor Feed that influences market prices.
Auth: JWT with college email verification
